name: spendly-plugin
description: Claude Code plugin for Spendly — a Flask + SQLite personal expense tracker built with spec-driven development. Bundles 6 slash commands (create-spec, ship-feature, test-feature, code-review-feature, seed-user, seed-expense), 4 subagents (quality-reviewer, security-reviewer, test-writer, test-runner), 1 UI design skill (frontend-design), and 2 hooks (black formatter, production DB guard).
